name: Scholastic School Bus
notes: No confident FMCSA SAFER match for a carrier at 1188 E 42nd St, Brooklyn, NY 11210. SAFER name-search for 'SCHOLASTIC SCHOOL BUS', 'SCHOLASTIC', and variants returned no records. A separate 'Scholastic Transportation' operates in Brooklyn (offices at 8024 Preston Ct, Brooklyn 11236; tied to Sunbright Transportation LLC USDOT 2638051) and a separate 'Scholastic Bus Corp.' is in Deposit, NY 13754 (per D&B/Manta) - neither matches the target Flatlands (11210) address, so they are NOT assumed to be the same. NY DOS API blocked by WAF and bizapedia/opencorporates pages CAPTCHA-gated. Recommend manual NY DOS entity search and FMCSA L&I CAPTCHA search.

name: Missouri Central School Bus
registry_source: BBB profile (Missouri Central School Bus, file opened 2022-05-05, business start 2004-03-04); MO Sec of State business entity search not directly confirmed
notes: Confirmed entity type LLC; founded 2004-03-04 per BBB. Missouri Central School Bus is a subsidiary/operating brand of NACSB (North America Central School Bus), an H.I.G. Capital portfolio company. Operates from 1218 Central Industrial Dr and 4014 Chouteau Ave, Saint Louis, MO 63110. SAFER name searches for 'MISSOURI CENTRAL SCHOOL BUS' and 'MISSOURI CENTRAL' returned no direct snapshot - the company likely registered FMCSA under a parent/NACSB-affiliated legal name, or under a name search prefix not yet matched. Ended SLPS contract June 2024 (WARN: ~332 layoffs at Spring/Hall Street locations); the Chouteau address operation may still be active for non-SLPS contracts. Approximate fleet (per public sources): operated 200+ buses for SLPS pre-2024; unknown post-2024.

name: Geronimo Professional Svc LLC
notes: No SAFER record matched 'GERONIMO PROFESSIONAL' or 'GERONIMO PROFESSIONAL SVC'. The only 'GERONIMO' SAFER hit is GERONIMO (USDOT 2108123) in Flint, MI - NOT a match. Property records at 25 N Mada Ave, Staten Island, NY 10310 show owner Michael J Brennan, not Geronimo - the company may garage/operate there but not own. NY DOS API blocked (WAF) and bizapedia CAPTCHA-gated; no Geronimo Professional Services LLC was confirmed via OpenCorporates/bizprofile. Several unrelated 'Geronimo' NY LLCs exist (Geronimo Realty LLC, Geronimo Enterprise LLC, Geronimo Properties LLC, Geronimo LLC) but none match name+address. Recommend manual NY DOS entity search by exact name 'GERONIMO PROFESSIONAL SVC LLC'.

name: D & J School Bus Co
entity_status: active (sole proprietorship under owner name Jeffrey L Agnew; DBA D AND J SCHOOL BUS CO)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT registration 2011-01-14); PA sole proprietor DBA - no separate PA Dept of State corporation filing found (operates under owner's legal name)
notes: High-confidence FMCSA match: legal name JEFFREY L AGNEW, DBA D AND J SCHOOL BUS CO, USDOT 2111268, exact address match 304 South Keystone Ave, Sayre PA 18840. MCS-150 dated 2025-05-12 with 13 power units and 10 drivers (a separate third-party source reported 17 units/18 drivers, possibly earlier MCS-150). Intrastate-only carrier with passenger op, no for-hire interstate authority. Operating Status ACTIVE, no Safety Rating recorded. Phone 570-888-2308. Owner Jeffrey L Agnew also owns Furman & Jones body shop and previously partnered in Valley Taxi (PA Bulletin records). inc_date populated with USDOT registration date as proxy for business commencement; underlying business may predate 2011.

name: Meryc Bus Co
entity_status: active (operating per Yelp listing updated April 2026 and NY workers comp trust membership)
registry_source: NY DOS (not confidently matched); Empire State Transportation Workers' Compensation Trust member roster confirms 'Meryc Bus Company Inc'
notes: No SAFER record matched 'MERYC' or 'MERYC BUS'. Meryc Bus Company appears on the Empire State Transportation Workers' Compensation Trust (terminated self-insured trust) member roster, indicating prior membership as a NY transportation operator. Public Yelp listing places the company at 20 Torre Pl (target address) and a related listing at 41 Torre Pl, Yonkers, NY 10703 (Mile Square Transportation occupies 41 Torre Pl - same block). NY DOS API blocked by WAF and bizapedia CAPTCHA-gated; could not confirm DOS filing date or officers programmatically. Active per Yelp (updated April 2026). Recommend manual NY DOS entity search for exact name 'MERYC BUS' and FMCSA L&I CAPTCHA name search by NY state.
